description: 155 - 31-03-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Sir Oliver Robbins (former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO), Morgan McSweeney (former Chief of Staff to the Prime Minist

participants.name: Sir Oliver Robbins
participants.role: former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs

participants.name: Morgan McSweeney
participants.role: former Chief of Staff to the Prime Minister

text:
Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO), Morgan McSweeney
(former Chief of Staff to the Prime Minister, No.10) and others

From: Oliver Robbins Personal
Sent: Mon 31/03/2025 10:45:59 AM (UTC)
To: Morgan McSweeneyI Personal ]; Peter
Mandelson Personal
Ce: Ailsa Terry (No.10) Personal James
Roscoe Fersonai Ninjeri Pandit Personal
Subject: RE: State visit

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

Peter
Specifically on the State Visit. | think for todav vou probably can go no further than the
PM/POTUS call, . You'd be saying

something like:
* Delighted it seems that we are aligning on an historic state visit in September.
The Palace is just working through the options in The King’s diary and then BE
Washington should be in a position to check the President's availability for
specific dates in the comina davs.

+ At our level we should focus on the content and narrative of the Visit. Would it
work for me to come to see you again next week to start working through this
given we will need pace and ambition from both sides to achieve our leaders’
aspirations?

Call if you need to discuss any of this. Hopefully we will soon be able to move from
working out the date to making a success of this important event. But | think

Olly

From: Morgan McSweeney
Sent: 30 March 2025 22:32
To: Peter Mandelson ; Oliver Robbins
Ce: Ailsa Terry (No.10) : James Roscoe
Subject: Re: State visit

Thank vou.

456

eee

Can we get the SV and objectives, themes etc as time is short in organisational terms
Thank you

From: Peter Mandelson Personal

Sent: Sunday, March 30, 2025 3:11:49 AM

To: Moraan McSweeney < Personal >; Oliver Robbins
ersonal

Cc: Ailsa Terry rersonal James Roscoe Personal

Subject: State visit
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Dear Morgan, dear Olly,

| am glad we are now settled on September for the State Visit. The dates 17-19
September work well in a busy ‘back to work’ month in the US (and with UNGA High
Level Week following on 23/9, and the party conference starting later on 28/9).

| am visiting the WH tomorrow, Monday, to meet with Susie Wiles and | know they are
anxious to confirm SV dates. Are you content for me firmly to offer the September
dates and, if acceptable to the President, for us to proceed quickly to the more formal
offer? My team will also work up with No10/FCDO any follow up points for the Wiles
meeting coming out of today’s PM-POTUS. all.

Very best
Peter
Lord Mandelson

HM Ambassador, Washinaton DC
Personal | Personal

457
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
